name: telegram-codex
description: Connect a Telegram bot to Codex through a local MCP bridge.

author.name: Local port of Anthropic Telegram plugin

interface.shortDescription: Read and reply to Telegram bot messages
interface.longDescription: Run a local Telegram bot bridge for Codex. Provides MCP tools to list inbound messages, reply, react, edit messages, and download attachments, with allowlist and pairing controls.
interface.developerName: Local port of Anthropic Telegram plugin
defaultPrompt: Reply to my latest Telegram DM
